case_title: DANIEL E BRITTON VS. BRIAN G JUNG

ORDER --PER COMM. BEST--DENYING JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, FILED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY FUND HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT; COPIES OF ORDER WITH CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL, SENT OUT TO ALL PARTIES.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUNG, BRIAN G $45,455.88 PRINCIPAL, $7.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45,462.88, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $45462.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
